author: nhannht
description: Intelligently generates timeline from your content

manifest.author: Nhan Nguyen
manifest.description: Your writing already contains a timeline. Historica finds it — NLP-powered date extraction from any note.
manifest.name: historica

# Release note

## [0.3.2] - 2024-10-24

### 🚀 Features
> [!note]
> - Update web document
> - Pink always funny
> - Ability to parse another file or import exist timeline
> - Rewrite image preview when choose attachments
> - Now auto save when Historica block have any id other than "-1"
> - Go to version 0.3.2


### 🐛 Bug Fixes
> [!note]
> - Single plot editor ux

# Release note

## [0.2.5] - 2024-04-29

### 🚀 Features
> [!note]
> - Make code base cleaner
> - Keep improving the codebase
> - Add support for additional 8 languages
> - Migrate document system to obsidian
> - GitHub action for docs
> - Add GitHub ci cd for the new document
> - Bump to 0.2.5, minimum version is 0.2.4


### 🐛 Bug Fixes
> [!note]
> - Package.json, build tailwind before build ts
> - Bug with pin time in other languages than "en" cannot understand default "now"
> - First attempt trying to add jest but no successful

releases.description:
# Release note

## [0.1.5] - 2024-03-17

### 🚀 Features
> [!note]
> - Improve block config verify
> - Add feature to pin time, all the relative time strings will treat that point of pin time as "now"
> - Timeline will display relative time as the exact time
> - Add options to export/copy as JSON/CSV


### 📚 Documentation
> [!note]
> - Improve document for 0.1.* era


### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks
> [!note]
> - [belong to the previous version]: publish as 0.1.3

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

releases.description:
# Release note

## [0.1.3] - 2024-03-12

### 🚀 Features
> [!note]
> - Now work with multi-time entries in the same sentence
> - Style 2 now uses white in the background instead of transparent
> - Add highlight syntax for historical language
> - Now you can query with multi-time ranges


### 🐛 Bug Fixes
> [!note]
> - Turn off debug


### 📚 Documentation
> [!note]
> - Cliff.toml


### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks
> [!note]
> - Gitignore


### Publish
> [!note]
> - As 0.1.2
